title: Video about guidelines for Parent on Student Requirements
Lovely Professional University
details:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Greetings from Lovely Professional University (LPU), India!

I am pleased to introduce Lovely Professional University (LPU)—India’s largest single-campus university, spanning over 600+ acres and home to 30,000+ on-campus students and 3,500 faculty and staff members. LPU offers a comprehensive portfolio of 200+ academic degree programs across diverse disciplines.

With a vibrant community of 4,000 international students from over 65 countries, LPU proudly hosts the highest number of international students on a single campus in India.

Accreditation's & Affiliations

Recognized by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Government of India.
Member of the prestigious Association of Indian Universities (AIU).
Rankings & Achievements

Awarded NAAC A++ Accreditation with an impressive 3.68/4 score, positioning LPU among India's top private universities.
Ranked among India's Top 10 Universities (including IITs and NITs) as per the Times Higher Education (THE) World University Rankings 2025.
Ranked 4th in India (government & private institutions) in the World University Ranking for Innovation (WURI) 2024.
Secured 27th position in the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2024 across all universities in India.
Global Presence

LPU has developed a series of international study programs with partner School/Universities, connecting students to over 500+ top institutions across the globe:


A wide range of academic offerings
Professional and transparent operations
Competitive and timely payouts
Dedicated partner support
Outstanding student satisfaction and success stories
Invitation for Collaboration

We are keen to explore a partnership with your esteemed organization to:

 Offer Global Education Pathways-Provide your students access to internationally recognized degrees and career opportunities
 Organize Career Counselling & Admission Guidance sessions- Virtual or in-person interactions to help students make informed career decisions.
 Establish a long-term partnership for students benefits.
We would love to discuss how we can work together for student’s benefits. Please share your interest and let us know a convenient time for a meeting, so that we can discuss terms and conditions.

For your reference, I have attached Booklet, University Profile and a Video. I am also sharing few links for detailed view:

·         LPU Website : http://www.lpu.in/international,

·         Virtual tour link- https://iviewd.com/lpu2/

·         Kindly fill out the Information Form

.            Video - LPU

 

Please feel free to contact me directly should you require any further information or clarification. I look forward to the possibility of working together and hope to hear from you soon. 


Thanks and Regards,  
(Mr.) Arpit Kaushal - Assistant Director
Division of International Consultancy and Training  Division of International Affairs
Lovely Professional University (LPU), Punjab, India 
Call/ WhatsApp: +91-9501110402

||विद्याधनं सर्वधनप्रधानम्
Knowledge is the supreme wealth

title: Explore Google Ads
details:
What is Google Ads? 
Google Ads is Google’s online advertising platform that allows businesses to show ads on:
 
    🔎 Google Search (sponsored results at the top)
    📺 YouTube
    🌐 Websites in the Google Display Network
    📱 Mobile apps
    🛍 Google Shopping results
 
It works mainly on a pay-per-click (PPC) model — meaning you pay only when someone clicks your ad.

Why Do We Use Google Ads?

1️⃣ To Get Instant Traffic
Unlike SEO (which takes time), Google Ads can bring visitors to your website immediately.
2️⃣ To Reach the Right People
You can target users based on:
    Keywords they search
    Location
    Age & gender
    Interests
    Device (mobile/desktop)
    Time of day
3️⃣ To Increase Sales & Leads
Great for:
    E-commerce sales
    Service bookings
    Phone calls
    App downloads
    Form submissions
4️⃣ To Control Budget
You can:
    Set daily budget
    Choose maximum cost per click
    Stop ads anytime
5️⃣ To Build Brand Awareness
Even if users don’t click, they still see your brand name.

This is what we offer: 
- Placement of 2 standees and 1 mini counter at each venue. 
- Branding allowed at 4 campuses (Tuol Sangke, Chbar Ampov, Chamka Dong and Sensok)  

Terms and Conditions: 
- We will convert the product to prizes for traditional games during the event 
- Product distribution directly to the students is not allowed. 
- Photos will be taken of the game's winners receiving prizes, and the branding will be included in these photos. 

Photo offered: 
- We will publish on our social media platform and allow the sponsor to share only. 
- Images cannot be altered or used for promotional ads.
